title: What do you want to see at Elevate 2023?
excerpt:
Hey Community! 
We are already thinking about Elevate 2023 (our global customer conference) and need your help! We want to make sure the Elevate 2023 is filled with content that best fits the needs and interest of our be…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community!

We are already thinking about Elevate 2023 (our global customer conference) and need your help! We want to make sure the Elevate 2023 is filled with content that best fits the needs and interest of our beloved community.

In case you want to check out what was included in our conference this year, you can have a look here.

So help us build monday.com’s next global conference by letting us know what you want to see at Elevate 2023?

  • Practical tips on how to boost your monday.com account
  • Short talks on work culture and efficiency
  • Stories of monday.com customers
  • Deep-dives on how to use monday.com products

0 voters

Any other ideas? Drop them in the comments!

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Pipeline for new features, please!!

More specifically:

  • news for custom automations supporting mirrored columns as regular ones, subitems and formulas
  • news regarding the behavior of dependencies

posts.author: kmcdaniel (Katie McDaniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d appreciate specific details about new features and products, instead of the general overview that’s already available in marketing materials.

Also, specific use cases that solve tough problems, or presentations from partner consultants that highlight innovative solutions at the enterprise level.

posts.author: ChrisCollings (Chris Collings)
posts.cookedHtml: Any news on times and dates for Elevate 2023?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Chris! Elevate 2023 will be toward end of year. Once we have dates finalized and information I will let you know!

posts.author: ChrisCollings (Chris Collings)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @Julietteb, Elevate was very informative last year, I’m looking forward to it. At the time they’d discussed holding it sooner this year, thank you for your clarification that it’s going to be around the same time.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone! I wanted to make sure you saw that Elevate 2023 is almost here. On December 14, you will have access to both our live and on demand content. Check it out make sure to register in advanced.

Elevate by monday.com

Join me at Elevate '23 by monday.com

Register for Elevate '23 to join monday.com's virtual customer conference on December 14th. Enjoy amazing keynote sessions, customer stories and more!
